body.title: CC walk: Igor caps ollama input at model context length
body.result: Target ticket already done. Walk admin close.
body.description:
Target: T-ollama-input-cap. Stale proposal cleared. Touches embedder.py + ollama_reasoner.py — neither is HIGH-inertia.

Checklist:
1. Set priority=0.95 on target; watch Igor claim
2. PLAN: embedder.py + ollama_reasoner.py — confirm no brainstem files
3. If false proposal: reset+inject specific file names
4. Verify truncation logic + tests + commit + done

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/embedder.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/reasoners/ollama_reasoner.py
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — scaffold T-ollama-input-cap
**Test plan:** target done.
